MemorySaver Checkpointer

Source: R/checkpointer.R
MemorySaver.Rd

In-memory implementation of the Checkpointer interface. Stores checkpoints in an R environment.

Super class

HydraR::Checkpointer -> MemorySaver

Public fields

storage

Environment. Stores the states.

Methods

Public methods

  • MemorySaver$new()

  • MemorySaver$put()

  • MemorySaver$get()

  • MemorySaver$clone()

Method new()

Initialize MemorySaver

Creates a new environment for in-memory checkpoint storage.

Usage

MemorySaver$new()

Method put()

Persist state to the checkpointer.

Usage

MemorySaver$put(thread_id, state)

Arguments

thread_id

String.

state

AgentState object.

Method get()

Load state from the checkpointer.

Usage

MemorySaver$get(thread_id)

Arguments

thread_id

String.

Returns

AgentState object or NULL.

Method clone()

The objects of this class are cloneable with this method.

Usage

MemorySaver$clone(deep = FALSE)

Arguments

deep

Whether to make a deep clone.
